source.title: The elastic constants and thermal expansion of single-crystal CdTe
source.journal: Journal of Physics D: Applied Physics

sample_and_measurement.specimen_form: plates with large faces on (110) planes
sample_and_measurement.thermal_expansion_method: strain gauge comparing sample expansion with Spectrosil B quartz
sample_and_measurement.temperature_sensor: gold +0.03 percent iron-chromel thermocouple calibrated against platinum resistance thermometer

reported_results.thermal_expansion_data_form: graphical in Figures 4 and 5; no numerical table printed

remaining_work: Digitize Figure 4 alpha(T) or Figure 5 fractional lattice change versus temperature.
Cross-check the digitized integral against the published 90 K-referenced fractional lattice-change curve.
Propagate the reported approximately 3 percent relative alpha uncertainty and temperature uncertainty to the Williams 293.15 K absolute lattice anchor.
Test sensitivity to the narrow 79 K anomaly and any visible hysteresis.
